title: FlowHub - Simple Project Management for Teams
seoTitle: FlowHub - Simple Project Management for Teams - Free SaaS Website Template | Multiverse
metaDescription: FlowHub - Collaborative project management made simple
summary: FlowHub - Collaborative project management made simple
description: FlowHub - Collaborative project management made simple
prompt: Build a premium saas website inspired by FlowHub - Simple Project Management for Teams. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.
Asset paths are normalized so the template can preview inside Multiverse.
responsiveNotes: Responsive layout comes from the original one-page template source.
Preview uses the real HTML file instead of a synthetic poster image.

files.summary: Main template source file imported from Website Template Hub.
files.content:
FlowHub
Features Benefits Reviews
Features Benefits Reviews
Used by 50K+ teams worldwide

Work Together,
Get More Done

FlowHub brings your entire team onto one visual workspace. Plan projects, collaborate in real-time, and ship faster than ever.

No credit card required • Set up in 2 minutes

Team Velocity

34% productivity boost

Everything You Need

Built for teams of all sizes

Kanban Boards

Visualize your workflow with drag-and-drop boards. Perfect for agile teams.

Timeline View

See all projects on a timeline. Plan sprints, manage dependencies, and track milestones.

Real-time Chat

Built-in messaging keeps conversations connected to the work. No more scattered chats.

Wiki & Docs

Centralized knowledge base. Keep all team docs in one searchable place.

Integrations

Connect with 200+ tools. Slack, GitHub, Figma, Jira, and more.

Enterprise Security

SOC 2 certified, SSO, audit logs, and advanced permissions. Enterprise-grade security.

Why Teams Love FlowHub

See the impact yourself

50% Faster Delivery

Reduce project delays by half. Better visibility = faster decisions.

Better Team Alignment

Everyone knows what's happening. Less meetings, more doing.

Save $50K Annually

Replace 5 tools with one. Significant cost savings for mid to large teams.

  • Product teams managing complex features
  • Marketing campaigns with multiple stakeholders
  • Remote teams across time zones
  • Agencies managing multiple client projects
  • Operations teams coordinating processes

98%

Team satisfaction rate

15h

Time saved per week per team

3x

Faster project execution

Loved by Teams Everywhere

"FlowHub completely transformed how our team works. We've cut project duration by 40% and communication is so much clearer. Best investment ever."

Alex Morgan

Product Manager, TechStart

"As a remote team, FlowHub has been a game-changer. Real-time collaboration, clear timelines, and integrated chat means we feel more connected than ever."

Sofia Rodriguez

Design Lead, Creative Studios

"We managed to consolidate 5 different tools into FlowHub. The simplicity is incredible, and our team picked it up immediately. Highly recommended!"

James Chen

CEO, Digital Ventures

Ready to Transform Your Team?

Join 50,000+ teams already using FlowHub.

FlowHub

Project management for modern teams
